name: speyer-ui
description: A lightweight, accessible design system built for colour-blind users and AI-assisted development.
author: Adrian Speyer

scripts.minify:css: npx clean-css-cli -o dist/sui-tokens.min.css sui-tokens.css && npx clean-css-cli -o dist/sui-components.min.css sui-components.css
scripts.build: npm run preflight && npm run minify:css && npm run minify:js
